scripts.start:api: ENV=dev npm run build && node dist/src/local-server.js
scripts.push_db_schema: npm run build && npx drizzle-kit push
scripts.make_lambda_build: rm -rf ./_aws_lambda_build && npm run build && node esbuild.lambda.mjs && cp lambda-package.json _aws_lambda_build/nodejs/node_modules/@project/backend/package.json
